text: My daily routine is quite consistent. I wake up at 6:30 a.m. and start with a glass of water, followed by a short meditation. After a light breakfast, I head to work by 8:30 a.m. My work schedule usually runs until 5 p.m., with a lunch break in the middle. In the late afternoon, I make time for exercise, often a 30-minute run or some yoga. Evenings are for relaxing—I enjoy cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a TV show. By 10:30 p.m., I’m in bed. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced every day.
